Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. No representative information provided.
Attorney Danial Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Jefferson is present.

Counsel and litigants confer.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-30-2012 is vacated.
